1.content: At first, it seemed as if nothing had changed. The crisp autumn air still sharp on your tongue, the gentle calls of some starly and pidgey in the distance... your surroundings were exactly the same as when you left them, as far as you were aware. As you begin to open your still weary eyes, the world begins to come into view. Everything is a blurry mess, but you notice nothing different. The atmosphere isstill a dense forest, trees stripped bare and leaves coating the moist soil. Groaning a bit, you attempt to sit upright only to collapse back to the ground with a loud HMPH. Some of your vision returns after this little slip up. (Tbc)
1.title: Has something changed?

11.content: Filler filler filler filler filler
11.title: Tbc

choices: Bite and scratch at his face
111.content:
The breloom seems to sense your fear.

As you continue to stare into his eyes, you can now see a slight smirk growing across his face, causing you to shudder at bit and puff up your fur.

You really don’t want to know what he’s thinking, but it becomes more clear when you notice something you were definitely not expecting.

The Breloom slinks toward you, keeping his head low to the ground as he begins to circle you.

The seed pods in his tail rattle each time the one of the Pokémon’s feet hits the ground, letting you know he’s ready to fight.
His warm breath washes over your fur as he stares at you, his face is way too close for comfort.
111.title: Frightened..

1111.content:
You gently stroke along his neck, petting from the chin to the base of the neck.

The breloom begins to murr blissfully, thumping his long thick tail against the grass, causing some spores to fly out.
He begins to nuzzle against your cheek, his face warm and smooth to the touch.
As you begin to relax a bit, the breloom begins to gently lick your face.
That hot, slimy tongue coats you with saliva, making the breloom’s intentions now very much clear.
1111.title: A sticky situation

112.content:
You stand up to face the breloom, which cocks his head curiously.

He slowly begins to approach you, his heavy hind claws making loud thud each time he steps forward.

Cowering a bit, you lower your head into the grass so only your ears stick out.

The duel type seems friendly and all, but he could just be putting up a facade followed by a wicked Mach punch for all you know.

As you hide yourself as best as you can, you hear the breloom approaching, closer and closer...

Suddenly, you feel the breloom’s whiffing at your face.

He lets out a soft murr.
112.title: Hiding

choices: Close your eyes and hope for the best
12.content:
As soon as you set one foot forward, toward the breloom, his head perks up from the grass he was rolling in only seconds ago.

The breloom then slowly rises to his red, twin-clawed feet, ‘loom’ing over your distant form.

You back away from him slowly, lowering yourself to the ground in submission to avoid any aggression from the slightly larger and much more dangerous pokemon.

As he glares at you, the breloom huffs and swishes his tail from side to side, releasing some light-colored spores into the air.

They weren’t enough to be dangerous, but if he were to charge, that would be different.

You continue backing up little by little, before falling backwards with a yelp of surprise and toppling onto your rear.
Startled, the aggressive pokemon charges forward, head aimed straight at yours and ready to bash your weak little skull in.
You freeze in petrified terror, heartbeat thumping so hard that it nearly aches. You attempt to scream, but no more than a little bit of air escapes your mouth.
12.title: A risky move...

info.brief_description: Includes vore and some nsfw elements~
info.description: It was the usual day at the local park. The crisp autumn breeze, the sound of small pokemon gleefully play fighting... it was quite lovely. Your trainer had left you here for a while while she visited with some neighbors. She knew how you hated the neighbors. Well, its better here than at home at least. Deciding to make the best of the situation, you peer around at the other pokemon. A poochyena and an electrike wrestle around in the grass, growling and barking and they play. There were plenty of other pokemon: a few nickits, a glameow, a ton of yampers, and one rather large breloom. How fascinating...
